final:
Plugins that register service names for `self.require()`:

- health — `health`
- notifications — `notifications`
- webcam — `webcam`
- obsidian — `viewer`
- blender — `blender`
- voice-api — no service names; it registers capability providers only (`kokoro`, `xtts`, `whisper` are providers, not services)

From `CLAUDE.md`, other service plugins include `applio`, `telegram`, `global-hotkey`, and `system-tray`, but I didn’t inspect those plugin files here, so I can’t confirm their exact `provides.services` entries from code.
